allow: Bash(python -c "import psycopg2; conn = psycopg2.connect\(''host=localhost user=postgres password=postgres dbname=postgres''\); conn.autocommit = True; cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(''CREATE DATABASE secretflow''\); print\(''Database created!''\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''pg''\); const client = new Client\({ host: ''localhost'', user: ''postgres'', password: ''postgres'', database: ''postgres'' }\); client.connect\(\); client.query\(''CREATE DATABASE secretflow'', \(err\) => { if \(err\) console.error\(err\); else console.log\(''Database created!''\); client.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Process { Get-Process -Id \\$_ } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.ProcessName -like '*postgres*' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, Path" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -c "CREATE ROLE secretflow WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'secretflow_password' CREATEDB;" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d secretflow -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE secretflow TO secretflow; GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO secretflow;" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d secretflow -c "UPDATE users SET password_hash = '\\$2a\\$10\\$XV3LX8zJqKxN9PqJzK8L5eYqZ8vN9X2mK5L8PqJzK8L5eYqZ8vN9X' WHERE username IN \('dev.alice', 'dev.bob', 'lead.carol', 'security.dave', 'svc.gitlab'\);" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d secretflow -c "SELECT username, password_hash FROM users LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)

Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d secretflow -c "UPDATE users SET password_hash = '\\$2a\\$10\\$POH6bJZLgXctRJRxy4eRHuZAFYEY.b.IZ5l2kcWA5f56gf4fqsXUa' WHERE username IN \('dev.alice', 'dev.bob', 'lead.carol', 'security.dave', 'svc.gitlab'\);" 2>&1)
Bash("C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d secretflow -c "SELECT username, LEFT\(password_hash, 50\) FROM users LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "pg = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -like ''*postgres*'' } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pg\) { Stop-Process -Id $pg.Id -Force }")
